text: Region: Massaaoudiye. Date: 2026-05-24. Predicted flood risk: Medium. Risk score: 0.5. Main drivers: moderate 7-day Open-Meteo precipitation; high relative humidity; soil moisture available; river discharge ratio 0.94x mean. 7-day rainfall is 30.24 mm, humidity is 82.0%, temperature is 20.0 C, wind speed is 10.0 m/s. Recommended action: Monitor low-lying roads and keep drainage crews on standby.
